metrics.label: Quality Score
metrics.description: Plain-language label for the benchmark's confidence-weighted score (CW%) used in the README and blog posts.

metrics.label: Balanced OTS
metrics.description: Operational triage score balanced across FP, Inc, and TP classes.

metrics.label: Critical Miss Rate %
metrics.description: Share of true positives classified as false positive.

metrics.label: False Review Load %
metrics.description: Share of false positives still sent to review as Inc or TP.

metrics.label: Threat Capture Rate %
metrics.description: Share of true positives still sent to review as Inc or TP.

metrics.label: False Escalation Rate %
metrics.description: Share of false positives escalated all the way to TP.

metrics.label: Ordinal %
metrics.description: Distance-based score without confidence weighting.

metrics.label: OTS %
metrics.description: Operational triage score across the full benchmark set.

metrics.label: OTS Macro
metrics.description: Operational triage score macro-averaged across classes.

metrics.label: Anomaly Capture %
metrics.description: Share of inconclusive or suspicious findings still surfaced for review.

metrics.label: Anomaly Suppression %
metrics.description: Share of anomaly-like findings suppressed out of review.

metrics.label: MAE
metrics.description: Priority-score mean absolute error.

metrics.label: RMSE
metrics.description: Priority-score root mean squared error.

metrics.label: Seconds / Event
metrics.description: Average wall-clock latency per finding reviewed.

metrics.label: Estimated Run Cost (¢)
metrics.description: Estimated benchmark-run cost based on total token usage and the committed OpenRouter pricing snapshot.

metrics.label: Exact Match Rate %
metrics.description: Share of all findings classified exactly like the ground truth.

metrics.label: Minor Miss Rate %
metrics.description: Share of all findings where the model was one classification step away.

metrics.label: Hard Error Rate %
metrics.description: Combined TP↔FP hard error share across all findings.

metrics.label: LLM Error Rate %
metrics.description: Share of all findings without a usable model response.

metrics.label: Total Tokens
metrics.description: Total tokens consumed across the benchmark run.

chart_gallery.title: Operational Profile Summary
chart_gallery.description: Compares the current profile leaders against the always-inc baseline across the main operational metrics.

chart_gallery.title: Operational Profile Summary by Tier
chart_gallery.description: Shows the current recommended profile leader inside each deployment tier.

chart_gallery.title: Classification Breakdown
chart_gallery.description: Shows how each model's classifications split into exact matches, near misses, and hard errors.

chart_gallery.title: Quality vs Speed
chart_gallery.description: Plots confidence-weighted quality against average seconds per event.

chart_gallery.title: Quality vs Cost
chart_gallery.description: Plots confidence-weighted quality against estimated benchmark run cost.

chart_gallery.title: CW Leaderboard
chart_gallery.description: Ranks models by the classic confidence-weighted benchmark score.

chart_gallery.title: Operational Error Breakdown
chart_gallery.description: Breaks operationally relevant error types into critical misses, false review, and escalation-related trade-offs.
